shots.caption: CAPSULE workspace — split sidebar with scrollable Capsules (CAP-R001..R008) and the super-saiyan Capture button.
Knowledge Graph Explorer — the contained force graph of requirements → capsules → skills → Backboard memory.
A capsule node selected — its provenance trace (finding, routed-to skill, technique to learn).
Skills panel — Enterprise OFF: project-pinned versions, condensed cards with fluorescent action buttons.
Skills panel — Enterprise ON (blue): capsule-maxxed best versions with the upgrade deltas lit.
Version History — day-grouped semver versions of a skill; every accepted finding mints a new version.
Versions Compare — two versions ticked drop into a word-level diff of changelog + guidance.
A/B Trials — Capsule vs Cold: measured tokens, steps and pass/fail per task; capsuled runs win.
Capture — MANUAL mode: pick a real ~/.claude session to distill on-device into a Handoff Capsule.
Capture — AGENTIC mode: auto-distill + the keep/skip gate (transfer ≥ threshold OR novelty ≥ 80).
Composer with Capsule injected ON (yellow aura) and the matching Agentic toggle — both the shared super-saiyan ON state.
Document set to Read only — the formatting toolbar dims and the surface goes inert for review.
@-mention in the composer — type @ to mention a requirement; the popover filters the requirement list live.
Side panel dragged wide — the graph + cards fluidly fill the extra width (resize separator, up to 680px).
Handoff & warm start — the 'You inherit' briefing plus the measured cold-vs-warm result from running both agents.
MULTI-DEV doc — 'Four branches: one enterprise master, three dev personal branches' that pin enterprise skills and contribute capsules back.

videos.caption: Hero — Handoff warm start: the 'You inherit' briefing, then the measured cold-vs-warm result of running both agents.
Agentic capture gate — auto-distill a real session on-device, then the keep/skip verdict against the threshold.
Capsule context toggle — the composer's yellow super-saiyan aura blooms as the latest capsule is injected.
Knowledge Graph Play — the RL story assembles in order: requirements → work orders → agents → sessions → capsules → skills → memory.
Enterprise toggle — skill cards flip from project-pinned to the capsule-maxxed enterprise-best versions in blue.
